summary: PO Resolution v2 Hardening Testing Complete - All 56 tests passed (34 unit + 22 API). Extended metrics endpoint returns miss_reason breakdown, BC link failure categorization, lookup_sources, and multi_po_count. Batch-resolve endpoint processes shipping docs with summary including miss_reasons, bc_link_failures, po_resolution_rate, bc_link_success_rate. Document detail API includes full po_resolution object with bc_link standardized fields.

minor.issue: BC API cannot connect in preview environment (invalid tenant). BC reference cache has 1616 real POs from production sync. All BC link attempts fail with bc_auth_error or bc_record_not_found.

critical_code_review_comments: po_resolution_service.py: Miss taxonomy correctly implemented with 9 distinct miss_reason values
po_resolution_service.py: is_valid_po_format correctly validates BC PO patterns (numeric, W/WA/WR/PR prefix)
po_resolution_service.py: is_known_non_po correctly flags SI-, SSH-, container patterns with confidence downgrade to 0.10
po_resolution_service.py: extract_po_candidates returns valid_format and is_non_po flags for each candidate
po_resolution_service.py: attempt_bc_link returns standardized result with status, bc_record_type, bc_record_id, link_method, error_code, error_message
po_resolution.py router: Extended metrics includes unresolved_by_miss_reason, bc_link_failures_by_reason, lookup_sources, multi_po_count
po_resolution.py router: batch-resolve returns summary with miss_reasons, bc_link_failures, po_resolution_rate, bc_link_success_rate
document_pipeline.py: po_resolution stage correctly positioned and persists po_resolution with bc_link to hub_documents
test_credentials: N/A - API tests used public endpoints
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing 10 shipping-style documents in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Resolution v2 hardening complete. GET /api/po-resolution/metrics returns: 10 shipping docs, 40% resolution rate (4/10), 0% BC link rate (BC auth fails in preview). Miss reasons: invalid_po_format (5), bc_lookup_error (1). BC link failures: bc_record_not_found (6), bc_auth_error (4). Resolved POs: 109023, 107346, 107459, W117397 (all via bc_cache_exact). POST /api/po-resolution/batch-resolve?force=true&limit=N processes docs and returns detailed summary.

verified: All miss_reason values are from valid taxonomy
Response has details array with doc_id, file_name, status, miss_reason, po_number, bc_link_status
Non-PO patterns get confidence downgraded to 0.10 in extract_po_candidates
po_resolution has miss_reason field (null for resolved, set for not_found)
po_resolution has bc_link object with standardized fields
po_resolution has candidates_raw and candidates_valid arrays
bc_link has error_code (categorized: bc_auth_error, bc_record_not_found, etc.)
34 unit tests pass for normalize_po, is_valid_po_format, is_known_non_po, extract_po_candidates
requires_po_resolution correctly identifies Shipping_Document, Warehouse_Receipt, Freight_Document

mocked_api_note: BC API cannot connect in preview environment (invalid tenant). BC reference cache has 1616 purchase orders from production sync. All BC link attempts fail with bc_auth_error.
